headline: Up 3x, Has AMD Cracked The Nvidia Code?
summary: For most of the AI boom, Nvidia (NVDA) has been the only name that mattered in data center hardware. That dynamic is shifting. AMD (AMD) stock has risen 55% year-to-date and remains up 3.5x over the last 12 months, powered by record data center revenues and an increasingly competitive GPU lineup.

content.title: Up 3x, Has AMD Cracked The Nvidia Code?
content.summary: For most of the AI boom, Nvidia (NVDA) has been the only name that mattered in data center hardware. That dynamic is shifting. headline: NVIDIA Falls 4% on Rotation Concerns: How Strong Profitability Could Save the Bull Case
summary: Shares of NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) are trading near $201 in mid-morning action on Thursday, down roughly 4% from Wednesday’s close of $209.25. The selling caps a stretch of intense rotation chatter, even after a 27% one-month rally heading into today. The move arrives as investors process a string of mega-cap artificial intelligence (AI) updates and revisit ... headline: Meta Looks to Raise as Much as $25 Billion With Jumbo Bond Sale
